channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light outside 36/38 has not been working for at least two weeks, 4th March
item.description:
Street light outside 36/38 has not been working for at least two weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wargrave Avenue, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of abandoned bins, 4th March
item.description:
Please empty and remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Bonfield Road, Hither Green, Greater London

item.description:
Please collect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29-39, Clarendon Rise, Hither Green, Greater London

item.title: Dumped filthy mattress, 4th March
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131-137, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bike and untaxed, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned bike and untaxed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ockham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th March
item.description:
Regular rubbish dumping at the corner, beyond that allowed for the shops and outside the time window. It creates a hazard getting my children to school and is unsightly and unhealthy! Would very much appreciate if you could start monitoring / address.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, drug taking paraphernalia, 4th March
item.description:
Three photos don't show the extent of litter here. This area is neglected by your staff but needs checking daily. Needs to be cleared immediately and regularly! A nice area is now a rubbish tip and haven for drug addicts. NOT ACCEPTABLE!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bleak Hill Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised trees, 4th March
item.description:
Trees are having branches ripped off. The branches are used to light fires. Remains of fires nearby. This issue needs to be addressed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bleak Hill Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other debris on Robert Dashwood Way as well as palettes further down the street, 4th March
item.description:
There is a mattress lying on the pavement with some pieces of wood and further down the street there is a pile of palettes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Robert Dashwood Way, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Primrose Gardens near junction with England's Lane, 4th March
item.description:
The previous e-bike bay at the foot of Primrose Gardens still has a metal post and road fittings which need to be removed and made good
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Elizabeth Mews, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple business ‘A-Boards’ appearing on Thames Path, 4th March
item.description:
In recent weeks businesses have started to place A-Boards advertising their business at the end of Horseferry Place on the Thames Path. These are just getting more and more in volume. Not only are they not permitted and unsightly, they are often positioned close to the cycle lane, making it dangerous. Further, these unauthorised advertising boards are left out at night, making them more dangerous. On several occasions these have been kicked / thrown by drunks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horseferry Place, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th March
item.description:
Flytipping g at hotspot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 192, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van left for months, 4th March
item.description:
The vehicle has obviously been involved in an accident and dumped for more than 2 months now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walpole Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned hire bikes, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned hire bikes blocking the traffic crossing outside Five Guys at coventry street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coventry Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 4th March
item.description:
This pothole has been outside No 24 Friern Watch Avenue for some time and is getting increasingly bigger each day, which is hazardous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Friern Watch Avenue, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no MOT dumped next to playground on Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Car dumped behind Spooner House, by the playground on Barnfield Estate. Vicinity of loads of dumped cars by the guy running a 2nd hand business. Photos taken 3rd March. 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SORN car dumped between 57 and 131 Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Flat tyres, clearly abandoned by same guy dumping cars everywhere round SE18. Photos taken 3rd March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised untaxed car dumped outside Spooner House, Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Car dumped on the pavement, not even a parking space, untaxed, vandalised. Same guy dumping cars everywhere. Photos taken 3rd March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A series of potholes in line causing cars to swerve, 4th March
item.description:
The main DANGEROUS pothole is so deep you can see the old stone road surface from the 1920/30s. Then adjacent to this huge hole there's a line of DANGEROUS POTHOLES. So cars are serving all over the place to avoid them in the morning rush. I've recorded 2 very near misses of cars serving at the same time as people with children walking along the same stretch of road. THIS IS AN ACCIDENT WAITING TO HAPPEN, NEEDS IMMEDIATE ATTENTION. 04/MARCH/2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cansisters dumped in alleyway, 4th March
item.description:
Box of canisters dumped behind the garages of Sutherland Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
